events.name: Tampa Bay Buccaneers at Detroit Lions

headlines.description: — Tom Brady  threw four touchdown passes in the only half he needed to play and the Tampa Bay Buccaneers went on to rout the Detroit Lions 47-7 Saturday, sealing a spot in the playoffs for the first time since...
headlines.shortLinkText: Brady-led Bucs top Lions 47-7 to end 13-year playoff drought

headlines.description: — Third-string quarterback C.J. Beathard threw three touchdown passes, Jeff Wilson ran for 183 yards, and the San Francisco 49ers dealt a brutal blow to the Arizona Cardinals' playoff hopes by defeating them 20-12 on Saturday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Third-string QB Beathard throws 3 TDs, 49ers stun Cardinals

events.name: Miami Dolphins at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — Ryan Fitzpatrick completed a 41-yard pass to Mack Hollins while being dragged down by the facemask and the Miami Dolphins moved one step closer to a playoff berth when Jason Sanders’ 44-yard field goal with 1 second remaining gave them a 26-25...
headlines.shortLinkText: Dolphins stun Raiders 26-25 to move step closer to playoffs
